title: Capture Request v1
description: Input to the `capture` operation. Produces one immutable L0 raw note in vault/00_Raw/ plus a capture event. Domain-neutral. The system assigns the note id (ULID); callers never supply it.

content.description: Verbatim raw content to store byte-faithfully in vault/00_Raw/. Never edited after write.

source.description: Adapter/source kind. MVP implements `paste` only; the others are reserved for later adapters. `transcript` is the media-intake adapter (EPIC-CORE-013).

title.description: Optional human title for the raw note. If omitted, the writer derives a slug from content/source.

tags.description: Optional tags applied to the raw note frontmatter.

ref.description: Optional external reference (URL, message id). Metadata only — never sensitive content.

media.description: Optional auditable, non-leaking media provenance (EPIC-CORE-013). Strict shape mirrors media_reference.schema.json; no raw-locator field is representable. Set by the media-intake adapter on `source: transcript` captures.

captured_at.description: Optional client-supplied capture time. Defaults to now if absent.
